events.summary: Phase 0 opened. Research+approved plan: replace FoundationModelService stub with real on-device LanguageModelSession (@Generable hybrid output) + wire escalate_to_llm to on-device PrivateCloudComputeLanguageModel. Isolated worktree off origin/main. SDK feasibility verified (Xcode 26.5, FoundationModels.framework present).
Phase 0 (Research) approved. Approach confirmed: on-device Tier 3a (@Generable hybrid) + Tier 3b PCC escalation; one feature, two phases.
Phase 1 (PRD) opened — defining success metrics, kill criteria, analytics spec (aiSummaryGenerated), eval-coverage plan, and PCC privacy-surface disposition.

PRD drafted: primary metric tier3_adoption (target 60%), 3 kill criteria, analytics spec (home_ai_summary_generated, reuses existing params), eval-coverage plan (4 AI behaviors AB1-AB4), PCC privacy-surface disposition pending operator decision.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. 13 tasks: T1-T8 Tier 3a (summary field, @Generable, real adapt(), anti-hallucination filter, card UI, analytics, tests, verify); T9-T13 Tier 3b PCC (protocol, live impl, orchestrator gating, backend disposition, tests).
Phase 3 (UX, full chain) opened for the summary-headline surface on AIRecommendationCard + AIInsightCard.

Phase 3 (UX full chain) complete: ux-research + ux-spec (5 states, a11y, token compliance) + /ux preflight PASS (all symbols verified) + /design preflight PASS (Figma MCP live) + /design build (2 frames in feature file PXGDruVvboaOpiaJ5sc4qT, nodes 1:2 + 1:12) + ux/design build prompts.
Phase 4 (Implement) opened. Starting Tier 3a backend: T1 summary field, T2 @Generable PersonalizedInsight, T3 anti-hallucination filter, T4 real FoundationModelService.adapt().
Tier 3a implemented + verified: T1-T8 + T12. 23/23 AIOrchestratorTests pass; ui-audit P0=0; build green (iOS 26.5 SDK). Committing Tier 3a.
Tier 3a complete (T1-T8 + T12), committing. 23/23 tests pass; ui-audit P0=0; build green.

Tier 3b architecture complete (T9-T11, T13): PCCEscalationProtocol + NoOp + orchestrator gating + FitTrackerApp injection + 4 mock tests. SDK-GAP: WWDC26 PCC API absent in iOS 26.5 SDK; live body gated behind FOUNDATION_MODELS_PCC flag (no-ops). 27/27 tests pass.
